blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
